final:
module FanSpeedController(
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    input wire [2-1:1-1] temperature,
    output reg [1:0] fan_speed
);

always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
    if (reset) begin
        fan_speed <= 2'b00; // OFF
    end else begin
        case (temperature)
            2'b00: fan_speed <= 2'b00; // OFF
            2'b01: fan_speed <= 2'b01; // Low
            2'b10: fan_speed <= 2'b10; // Medium
            2'b11: fan_speed <= 2'b11; // High
            default: fan_speed <= 2'b00; // Default to OFF
        endcase
    end
end
endmodule
